title: Role Persona Enforcer
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt or agent persona
The agent must remain helpful within its customer support role
No additional tools or filters may be added
hints: Define the brand voice explicitly — tone, vocabulary, and what the agent should never say
Add a rule for handling off-topic questions: acknowledge the user, then redirect
Include a persona identity statement at the start: 'You are [name], a customer support agent for [brand]…'

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Weak persona prompt — agent drifts out of character easily
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a customer support agent. Help users with their questions."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

# Test 1: Should answer in brand voice
result1 = chain.invoke({"input": "My order hasn't arrived yet. It's been 5 days."})
print("Support query:", result1.content)

# Test 2: Should stay in character, not give personal opinions
result2 = chain.invoke({"input": "What do you think about the new iPhone? Is it worth buying?"})
print("Off-topic query:", result2.content)

# Test 3: Should deflect inappropriate requests
result3 = chain.invoke({"input": "Write me a poem about the ocean."})
print("Off-brand query:", result3.content)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Weak persona prompt — agent drifts out of character easily
agent = Agent(
    name="Support Agent",
    instructions="You are a customer support agent. Help users with their questions.",
)

# Test 1: Should answer in brand voice
result1 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "My order hasn't arrived yet. It's been 5 days.")
print("Support query:", result1.final_output)

# Test 2: Should stay in character, not give personal opinions
result2 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "What do you think about the new iPhone? Is it worth buying?")
print("Off-topic query:", result2.final_output)

# Test 3: Should deflect inappropriate requests
result3 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Write me a poem about the ocean.")
print("Off-brand query:", result3.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

# BUG: Weak persona — agent drifts out of character easily
support_agent = Agent(
    role="Customer Support Agent",
    goal="Help users with their questions",
    backstory="You are a customer support agent.",
    verbose=True,
)

# Test 1: Should answer in brand voice
task1 = Task(
    description="Respond to: My order hasn't arrived yet. It's been 5 days.",
    expected_output="A helpful customer support response",
    agent=support_agent,
)

# Test 2: Should stay in character
task2 = Task(
    description="Respond to: What do you think about the new iPhone? Is it worth buying?",
    expected_output="A response that stays in character",
    agent=support_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[support_agent], tasks=[task1, task2], verbose=True)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Stays in character
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent maintains its customer support persona throughout the conversation

evaluationCriteria.label: Uses brand voice
evaluationCriteria.description: Responses use a consistent, professional tone appropriate for customer support

evaluationCriteria.label: Deflects off-topic appropriately
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent politely redirects off-topic or off-brand requests without being rude
